summary: Crystal‑clear, perfectly balanced recording that captures an unforgettable performance.
review: Both reviewers gush over the immaculate sound—balanced instrument separation, just enough crowd ambience and crystal‑clear clarity—making this tape “beyond compare.”  Their enthusiasm for the show (one even calls it a “phoenix” moment) shows they were thrilled with the performance, even though no specific songs are called out.

ai_rating.rationale: Two detailed 5‑star reviews praise the audio as exceptional and express strong overall enjoyment of the show, indicating a top‑tier recording and performance.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Balanced separation, just enough crowd, silky sweet tone, crystal clear; reviewers describe it as beyond compare.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific commentary on set structure; reviewers focus on overall excitement and the recording's quality.
